text: Called in this morning as a warning light showed up on my dash.The guys wired the car up.Checked the fault. Cleared it.Told me what it was and if I had any further issues to bring it in again....And they never charged me !! Second time I have used them.Would not go anywhere else !
Excellent service from Darren and team today. Polite  friendly and honest. Workarea and reception clean and tidy and prices were competitive too. Will definitely be my regular garage going forward.

Friendly and helpful guys. My car had an oil leak and I'd booked it in for diagnostics. They quickly found the source of the leak and had a part brought to them to fit. All-in-all it was fixed within the hour. Big relief to me and the price they charged was was reasonable. I can't recommend this garage enough.

I took my car for service and mot after being recommended by a friend who has used the garage for 10 years and wish I had come here sooner. Great service from start to finish and very good price. Thank you

Visited yesterday to have a punctured tyre replaced,after their inspection they repaired the tyre at no charge.
I had previously purchased the tyres from them and it is there policy to repair punctures FOC
Great honest customer service from the team,can highly recommend this centre
